_meta.description: Feature tracker. Only update status, last_tested, and notes.

features.description: Repo bootstrap artifacts exist: CLAUDE.md, feature-list.json, proj-progress.txt, proj-progress.json, and init.sh.
features.notes: Verified via ./init.sh and root workflow files.

features.description: The workspace builds successfully with pnpm build on a clean checkout.
features.notes: Verified via pnpm build after all 6 phases implemented.

features.description: The workspace test suite completes successfully with pnpm test.
features.notes: 113 tests pass across all packages (core: 64, fonts: 19, cli: 30).

features.description: fetchtype init writes a valid starter token file without overwriting existing work unless --force is passed.
features.notes: Verified via CLI tests. Now supports --preset and --prompt flags.

features.description: fetchtype validate reads a token file, reports schema and accessibility diagnostics, and exits 0 on pass or 1 on validation failure.
features.notes: Verified with passing and failing CLI runs. Now includes font validation and 13 validation rules.

features.description: fetchtype build emits CSS and JSON token bundles into an output directory when validation passes.
features.notes: Verified via CLI tests. Now supports --format tailwind/shadcn and --report.

features.description: Core validation catches inaccessible primary text/background contrast pairs when colors are expressed as hex values.
features.notes: Verified via failing CLI validate path and core tests.

features.description: Core validation warns when typography tokens violate minimum body line-height, button size, or prose width guidance.
features.notes: Verified via core warning-path tests.

features.description: A reusable base preset exists and can be used by both documentation and the CLI init command.
features.notes: 5 presets available: base, editorial, dashboard, ecommerce, docs.

features.description: The repository documents product positioning, free tier, upgrade path, and launch sequencing in a versioned strategy file.
features.notes: Documented in docs/launch-strategy.md.

features.description: The free tier offers enough local value to drive adoption without requiring hosted infrastructure.
features.notes: Explicitly defined in docs/launch-strategy.md.

features.description: Paid features are tied to collaboration, governance, policy enforcement, and reporting rather than core validation access.
features.notes: Explicitly defined in docs/launch-strategy.md.

features.description: The token model documents a path to W3C Design Tokens compatibility, including aliases and future theme extensions.
features.notes: Documented in docs/w3c-interop.md and backed by alias resolution plus named theme support.

features.description: Font resolution supports referenced Google Fonts or self-hosted assets before any hosted CDN work is attempted.
features.notes: Verified with fonts package tests. Now includes catalog of 31 Google Fonts and font suggestion engine.

features.description: The token system evolves beyond light/dark into named brands and accessibility modes without breaking current CLI behavior.
features.notes: Verified via themes, modes (display/interface/reading/mono), and mode-aware CSS generation.

features.description: A published GitHub-friendly distribution path exists so external repos can validate tokens without depending on this repo layout.
features.notes: Verified via packed fetchtype tarball install in a temp project plus external validate/build runs.

features.description: CLI output can produce GitHub-friendly summaries or annotations for pull request review flows.
features.notes: Verified via CLI tests plus packed tarball validation with --github.

features.description: fetchtype can import or export a first-class W3C-style $value token document without losing theme or alias intent.
features.notes: importW3cTokens/exportW3cTokens in @fetchtype/core, CLI import command and build --format w3c. 21 tests covering roundtrip, aliases, themes, modes, minimal import.

features.description: New validation rules: heading levels, caption min size, line-height ratio, spacing consistency, heading size order, dark mode completeness
features.notes: 7 new rules implemented: caption/label min size, line-height heading-vs-body, spacing monotonic, heading size direction, scale divergence, theme dark-mode completeness.

features.description: Computed type scale from named ratio + base size
features.notes: packages/core/src/scale.ts with computeHeadingSizes and generateHeadings. SCALE_RATIOS: minor-second through perfect-fifth.

features.description: --preset <name> flag with editorial/dashboard/ecommerce/docs presets
features.notes: 5 presets available via fetchtype init --preset <name>. All presets pass validation.

features.description: Token modes section with independent accessibility validation per mode
features.notes: Modes schema added to types. Base preset has display/interface/reading/mono modes. Mode validation runs all checks independently.

features.description: Mode-aware CSS generation ([data-mode="..."] blocks)
features.notes: generateCssVariables emits [data-mode="display"] etc. blocks with only overridden variables.

features.description: Tailwind config exporter (--format tailwind)
features.notes: packages/core/src/exporters/tailwind.ts generates tailwind.config.ts partial. 7 tests.

features.description: shadcn CSS exporter (--format shadcn)
features.notes: packages/core/src/exporters/shadcn.ts generates CSS with HSL variables. 12 tests.

features.description: Preview server (fetchtype preview)
features.notes: packages/cli/src/preview.ts — Node.js http server with file watching. No external deps.

features.description: HTML report generator (--report flag)
features.notes: packages/core/src/report.ts generates self-contained HTML with specimens, palettes, spacing, and diagnostics. 12 tests.

features.description: Google Fonts catalog + system font stack database
features.notes: packages/fonts/src/catalog.ts with 31 popular Google Fonts. lookupFont and searchFonts functions. 8 tests.

features.description: Font suggestion by context (fetchtype suggest)
features.notes: packages/fonts/src/suggest.ts with suggestFonts(). CLI command with --context, --limit, --variable-only, --json. 7+4 tests.

features.description: Font loading validation (availability, payload, fallbacks)
features.notes: validateFonts() in core with missing-fallbacks, payload-estimate (150KB), and unknown-family rules. 5 tests.

features.description: MCP server for AI agent integration
features.notes: packages/cli/src/mcp.ts with 5 tools: validate, build, suggest, init, presets. Uses @modelcontextprotocol/sdk stdio transport. 2 tests.

features.description: Natural language init (--prompt)
features.notes: packages/cli/src/prompt-init.ts — rule-based prompt parsing (no API key needed). Maps keywords to presets + modifiers. 12 tests.
